title: Game Stage HUD
summary: Added a compact Game Stage HUD and focused Systems Grid presentation so lane minigames feel more like playable modules and less like long page stacks.
changes: Game mode now hides duplicated detail page chrome and replaces it with a compact arcade navigation HUD.
The Systems Grid minigame now suppresses the duplicate card stack in Game mode while keeping the animated control plane, current module status, and working step controls visible.
Phone-width Game mode keeps the systems hero, verdict, control plane, and actions inside a tighter first-screen panel.
